items.title: Olympian Simpson leaves hospital after cardiac arrest
items.summary: Olympic medallist Jenny Simpson is released from hospital after suffering a cardiac arrest while running at an event in the United States last week.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
